creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
The suricata update in bug 210490 creates a new HYPERSCAN option which depends on the hyperscan shared library being installed.

I believe most if not all ports that can provide a shared library, install them by default so that other applications can then depend on them. 

I believe this should be the case for hyperscan as well (at least until such time as we have support for automatica *-{shared,static} sub-packages (variants)

I'm happy to create a patch and commit this if you're time-limited
